tier_definitions.1: Critical — Tenant-wide write to identity, mail, or files; domain-wide delegation
tier_definitions.2: High — Tenant-wide read OR user-scoped write to sensitive resources (mail, full drive)
tier_definitions.3: Moderate — User-scoped read to sensitive resources, or write to bounded resources
tier_definitions.4: Low — Profile, openid, basic identity claims, app-specific data

scopes.rationale: Full unrestricted access to Gmail including send, delete, and manage — equivalent to full mailbox control
Read, send, delete, and manage labels on user's mail — full write minus settings
Can create and send email as the user — impersonation risk for phishing
Read all user mail content including attachments — data exfiltration risk
Send mail as the user without read access — impersonation vector
Create, read, update, delete labels only — no message content access
Add-on scoped compose action — bounded to add-on context, not full compose
Add-on action on currently open message — bounded to single message context
Add-on read of current message metadata (headers) — no body access
Add-on read of current message content — bounded to open message
Read message metadata (headers, labels) without body content
Insert mail into mailbox (no send) — can plant messages but not send externally
Full read/write access to all user Drive files — complete file exfiltration and modification
Read all user Drive files — complete file exfiltration without modification
Access only to files created or opened by the app — bounded scope, not full Drive
Access only to app-specific hidden folder in Drive — no user file access
Read access to photos in Google Drive — sensitive personal content
View file metadata (names, sharing) but not content — reveals file inventory
View and modify file metadata — can alter sharing, names, properties
View activity records for Drive files — reveals access patterns
Full read/write to all Google Docs — document content exposure and modification
Read all Google Docs content — document exfiltration
Full read/write to all Google Sheets — spreadsheets often contain sensitive data
Read all Google Sheets — data exfiltration from spreadsheets
Full read/write to Google Slides — less sensitive than docs/sheets typically
Read all Google Slides — content exposure
Full read/write to calendar — can view meetings, add events, modify schedule
Read calendar events — reveals meeting schedules, attendees, locations
Read calendar events (same as calendar.readonly for practical purposes)
Create, modify, delete calendar events — schedule manipulation
Full read/write to contacts — PII exposure and social graph mapping
Read contacts — PII and social graph exposure
Read 'other contacts' (auto-saved) — lower sensitivity than managed contacts
Read Google Workspace directory — org chart and employee enumeration
Read all users in the domain directory — full tenant user enumeration
Full user management — create, modify, delete users in the tenant
Full group management — modify group membership controls access to resources
Read all groups and membership — reveals access control structure
Manage organizational units — structural control over tenant
Manage domains — tenant-wide identity control
Full access to all GCP resources — infrastructure-level control
Read all GCP resources — infrastructure enumeration
Read YouTube account data — low sensitivity
Upload videos to YouTube — reputational risk if misused
Full YouTube account management — channel modification
Read user email address — basic identity claim
Read user profile info (name, picture) — basic identity claim
OpenID Connect authentication — minimal identity assertion
OpenID Connect email claim — equivalent to userinfo.email
OpenID Connect profile claim — equivalent to userinfo.profile
Full access to Google Tasks — may contain sensitive to-do items
Read Google Tasks — low sensitivity
Read and write Google Chat messages — communication interception and impersonation
Read all Google Chat messages — communication surveillance
Manage Chat spaces — structural access to communication channels
Manage Google Groups settings — can alter access controls on group resources
Full access to Google Keep notes — may contain sensitive information
Read Google Keep notes — content exposure
Read and write Google Forms — may contain survey data or internal processes
Read Google Forms structure — low sensitivity without response data
Read form responses — may contain PII or sensitive survey answers
Apps Script can make external network requests — data exfiltration channel
Manage Apps Script projects — code execution within tenant context
Chrome sync and account login scope — browser session access
Google Drive for desktop sync scope — bounded to desktop client operation
